title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ABB India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ABB India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ABB India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
